summary: Auth bug fix verification complete. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend login/register flows working correctly. DB_NAME change to 'odapto' verified working. Bcrypt fix for Google OAuth users verified (returns 401 not 500).

issues: Name input doesn't have 'name' attribute - relies on DOM order. Consider adding data-testid attributes for better testing.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/health returns healthy status
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials returns user data and session_token
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with invalid credentials returns 401
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with wrong password returns 401
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with Google OAuth user (no password) returns 401 NOT 500 (bcrypt fix verified)
Backend: POST /api/auth/register with new user returns user data and session_token
Backend: POST /api/auth/register with existing email returns 400
Backend: GET /api/auth/me with valid token returns user info
Backend: GET /api/auth/me with invalid token returns 401
Backend: GET /api/auth/me without token returns 401
Backend: GET /api/auth/google redirects to accounts.google.com (not auth.emergentagent.com)
Backend: POST /api/auth/google/callback without code returns 400
Backend: POST /api/auth/google/callback with invalid code returns 401
Backend: Register→Auth/me flow works correctly
Backend: Login→Auth/me flow works correctly
Frontend: Login page loads with email, password inputs and Sign in button
Frontend: Login page has 'Continue with Google' OAuth button
Frontend: Login with valid credentials redirects to /dashboard
Frontend: Dashboard shows 'Welcome back' greeting and toast
Frontend: Registration page loads with Full Name, Email, Password inputs
Frontend: Registration with new user redirects to /dashboard with 'Account created successfully' toast
Frontend: OAuth callback without code redirects to /login (expected error handling)
Frontend: Google OAuth button redirects to accounts.google.com

db_name_fix.details: Changed DB_NAME from 'test_database' to 'odapto'. Admin user works correctly in new DB.

bcrypt_crash_fix.details: verify_password() now returns False for Google OAuth users (no password_hash) instead of crashing with 'Invalid salt'. Test confirmed: login with google_user@test.com returns 401, not 500.

google_oauth_redirect.details: Google OAuth flow redirects to accounts.google.com. Callback component properly redirects to /dashboard on success or /login on error.

critical_code_review_comments: verify_password() fix at lines 347-353: checks for empty/short hashed string before bcrypt.checkpw - prevents crash for OAuth users
DB selection logic at lines 33-42: smart fallback for Atlas connections when DB_NAME is test_database
Frontend registration form inputs lack 'name' attributes - uses DOM order for field identification
seed_data_creation: playwright_test_60574@example.com created during frontend registration test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth bug fixes verified. Key test: POST /api/auth/login with Google OAuth user email returns 401 (not 500 crash). Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_auth_flows.py. All core auth endpoints working: login, register, auth/me, google oauth initiation, google oauth callback. DB is now 'odapto' not 'test_database'.
